title: Orchestration — Agent Run Lifecycle, Memory, Approval Interrupt

tasks.title: Hermes Orchestrator service: plan → delegate → monitor → report
Memory write/search adapter: GBrain/PGLite + vector (768 dims)
Tool permission resolver per agent role
Human approval interrupt mechanism (workflow pauses, resumes on approve)
Agent periodic report cycle (6h) via cron
CEO daily synthesis report (9 AM Mon-Fri)
Build Agent Teams page (org chart, run cycles, reports)
Build Task Engine page (Kanban, queues, SLA, automation rules)
